name: hcportal_editKennel
description: Updates an existing kennel's settings. Update-only (no insert path). Uses a COALESCE pattern: only parameters supplied as non-NULL are written; NULL means 'leave unchanged'. Two exceptions: @latitude and @longitude use -999.0 as a sentinel to explicitly set both columns to NULL (geographic nulling). There is no sentinel for clearing string fields to NULL. Covers kennel identity, dissemination, Google Calendar, payment config (3 slots), pricing, currency, location, tags, membership, notifications, and feature tier. Includes duplicate-name detection with auto-suggested alternatives for KennelUniqueShortName. UPDATE wrapped in a transaction.

parameters.name: publicHasherId
parameters.description: Auth: identifies the calling user. Passed to HC6.ValidatePortalAuth.

parameters.name: accessToken
parameters.description: Auth: short-lived cryptographic token validated via HC6.ValidatePortalAuth.

parameters.name: publicKennelId
parameters.description: Routing: identifies the kennel to update. Validated IS NULL after auth. Kennel must exist.

parameters.name: kennelStatus
parameters.description: Kennel status enum. NULL = no change.

parameters.name: kennelName
parameters.description: Full kennel name. NULL = no change.

parameters.name: kennelAdminEmailList
parameters.description: Comma-separated admin email addresses. NULL = no change.

parameters.name: disseminateHashRunsDotOrg
parameters.description: Whether to disseminate events to HashRuns.org. NULL = no change.

parameters.name: disseminateAllowWebLinks
parameters.description: Whether dissemination allows web links. NULL = no change.

parameters.name: disseminationAudience
parameters.description: Dissemination audience scope. NULL = no change.

parameters.name: disseminateOnGlobalGoogleCalendar
parameters.description: Whether to publish to global Google Calendar. Changed from INT (HC5) to SMALLINT in HC6 to match table column. NULL = no change.

parameters.name: googleCalendarId
parameters.description: Google Calendar ID for this kennel. NULL = no change.

parameters.name: publishToGoogleCalendar
parameters.description: Whether to publish events to kennel's own Google Calendar. NULL = no change.

parameters.name: publishToGoogleCalendarAddresses
parameters.description: Google Calendar addresses to publish to. NULL = no change.

parameters.name: canEditRunAttendence
parameters.description: Whether users can edit run attendance. NULL = no change. Note: column name retains original typo.

parameters.name: kennelShortName
parameters.description: Short display name for the kennel. NULL = no change.

parameters.name: kennelUniqueShortName
parameters.description: Globally unique short name. Widened from NVARCHAR(25) in HC5 to NVARCHAR(50) in HC6 to match table column. Validated for uniqueness with auto-suggested alternatives on conflict. NULL = no change.

parameters.name: kennelDescription
parameters.description: Full kennel description text. NULL = no change.

parameters.name: kennelLogo
parameters.description: URL to kennel logo image. NULL = no change.

parameters.name: kennelPinColor
parameters.description: Map pin color enum. NULL = no change.

parameters.name: kennelCoverPhoto
parameters.description: URL to kennel cover photo. NULL = no change.

parameters.name: kennelWebsiteUrl
parameters.description: External kennel website URL. NULL = no change.

parameters.name: kennelEventsUrl
parameters.description: External events page URL. NULL = no change.

parameters.name: kennelHcEventsUrl
parameters.description: Harrier Central events page URL. NULL = no change.

parameters.name: kennelMismanagementTeam
parameters.description: Mismanagement team details (free text or JSON). NULL = no change.

parameters.name: defaultEventPriceForMembers
parameters.description: Default event price for members. NULL = no change.

parameters.name: defaultEventPriceForNonMembers
parameters.description: Default event price for non-members. NULL = no change.

parameters.name: defaultEventCurrencyType
parameters.description: Default currency type for events. NULL = no change.

parameters.name: defaultRunStartTime
parameters.description: Default start time for new runs. NULL = no change.

parameters.name: currencyCode
parameters.description: ISO currency code. NULL = no change.

parameters.name: primaryCultureCode
parameters.description: Primary culture/locale code. NULL = no change.

parameters.name: currencySymbol
parameters.description: Currency display symbol. NULL = no change.

parameters.name: digitsAfterDecimal

parameters.name: bankScheme

parameters.name: bankBic

parameters.name: bankBeneficiary

parameters.name: kennelPaymentScheme
parameters.description: Payment slot 1: scheme identifier. NULL = no change.

parameters.name: kennelPaymentUrl
parameters.description: Payment slot 1: payment URL. NULL = no change.

parameters.name: kennelPaymentUrlExpires
parameters.description: Payment slot 1: URL expiry date. NULL = no change.

parameters.name: kennelPaymentMemberSurcharge
parameters.description: Payment slot 1: member surcharge. NULL = no change.

parameters.name: kennelPaymentNonMemberSurcharge
parameters.description: Payment slot 1: non-member surcharge. NULL = no change.

parameters.name: kennelPaymentUrlExpires2

parameters.name: kennelPaymentMemberSurcharge2
parameters.description: Payment slot 2: member surcharge. NULL = no change.

parameters.name: kennelPaymentNonMemberSurcharge2
parameters.description: Payment slot 2: non-member surcharge. NULL = no change.

parameters.name: kennelPaymentScheme3
parameters.description: Payment slot 3: scheme identifier. NULL = no change.

parameters.name: kennelPaymentUrl3
parameters.description: Payment slot 3: payment URL. NULL = no change.

parameters.name: kennelPaymentUrlExpires3
parameters.description: Payment slot 3: URL expiry date. NULL = no change.

parameters.name: kennelPaymentMemberSurcharge3
parameters.description: Payment slot 3: member surcharge. NULL = no change.

parameters.name: kennelPaymentNonMemberSurcharge3

parameters.name: kennelFeaturesExpire

parameters.name: kennelGoogleSheetApiKey
parameters.description: Google Sheets API key for data import. NULL = no change.

parameters.name: allowSelfPayment
parameters.description: Whether members can self-report payments. NULL = no change.

parameters.name: allowNegativeCredit
parameters.description: Whether negative credit balances are allowed. NULL = no change.

parameters.name: cityId
parameters.description: City reference ID. NULL = no change.

parameters.name: provinceStateId
parameters.description: Province/state reference ID. NULL = no change.

parameters.name: countryId
parameters.description: Country reference ID. NULL = no change.

parameters.name: latitude
parameters.description: Kennel latitude. Sentinel: -999.0 on either @latitude or @longitude sets both Latitude and Longitude columns to NULL (geographic nulling). Otherwise NULL = no change. Sentinel changed from 999 (HC5) to -999.0 in HC6.

parameters.name: longitude
parameters.description: Kennel longitude. Sentinel: -999.0 on either @latitude or @longitude sets both Latitude and Longitude columns to NULL (geographic nulling). Otherwise NULL = no change. Sentinel changed from 999 (HC5) to -999.0 in HC6.

parameters.name: defaultRunTags1
parameters.description: Default bit-flag primary tags for new runs. NULL = no change.

parameters.name: defaultRunTags2
parameters.description: Default bit-flag secondary tags for new runs. NULL = no change.

parameters.name: defaultRunTags3
parameters.description: Default bit-flag tertiary tags for new runs. NULL = no change.

parameters.name: kennelGeolocation
parameters.description: Kennel geography point. NULL = no change. Note: GEOGRAPHY type cannot be passed from most API callers; this parameter is only usable from within SQL.

parameters.name: membershipDurationInMonths
parameters.description: Duration of membership period in months. NULL = no change.

parameters.name: runCountStartDate
parameters.description: Date from which run counting begins. NULL = no change.

parameters.name: distancePreference
parameters.description: Distance unit preference (metric/imperial). NULL = no change.

parameters.name: extApiKey
parameters.description: External API key. NULL = no change.

parameters.name: kennelSearchTags
parameters.description: Free-text search tags for kennel discovery. NULL = no change.

parameters.name: excludeFromLeaderboard
parameters.description: Whether to exclude this kennel from leaderboards. NULL = no change.

parameters.name: notificationMinutesBeforeRunForChatPushNotifications
parameters.description: Minutes before run to send chat push notifications. NULL = no change.

parameters.name: notificationMinutesBeforeRunForCheckinReminder
parameters.description: Minutes before run to send check-in reminders. NULL = no change.

rowsets.name: ErrorEnvelope
rowsets.description: Returned on any validation, auth, or runtime error. Short-circuits on first error. Duplicate KennelUniqueShortName errors include auto-suggested alternatives in ErrorMessage.

rowsets.name: SuccessResult
rowsets.description: Returned after successful UPDATE of HC.Kennel.

sideEffects: UPDATE HC.Kennel — all provided non-NULL fields via COALESCE pattern. Latitude and Longitude are set to NULL if either @latitude or @longitude equals -999.0.
breakingChangeRules: Never remove a column from any rowset
Never change a sentinel value meaning
Never change the lat/lon nulling sentinel (-999.0) without updating all callers
